args.query:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, repo_data_description, sample_path
FROM contents
WHERE sample_path LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
  AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%copies%'
;

args.query:
SELECT f.id, f.repo_name, f.path, c.repo_data_description
FROM files f
JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (c.repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(c.repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
LIMIT 20;

args.query: SELECT id, repo_data_description FROM contents LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, repo_data_description FROM contents LIMIT 5;

args.query:
SELECT f.id,
       MAX(CASE WHEN lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_non_binary,
       SUM(CASE WHEN lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%seen %times%' OR lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%appearing %times%' OR lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%appears %times%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_desc,
       COUNT(*) AS n
FROM files f
JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
GROUP BY f.id
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT f.id,
       MAX(CASE WHEN lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_non_binary,
       SUM(CASE WHEN lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%seen %times%' OR lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%appearing %times%' OR lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%appears %times%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_desc,
       COUNT(*) AS n
FROM files f
JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
GROUP BY f.id
LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH swift_files AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f.id
  FROM files f
  JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
  WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
    AND lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
), copies AS (
  SELECT id, CAST(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS seen_times,
            CAST(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appearing ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS appearing_times,
            CAST(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS appears_times
  FROM contents
)
SELECT sf.id,
       COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) AS copies,
       f.repo_name,
       f.path
FROM swift_files sf
JOIN copies c ON c.id = sf.id
JOIN files f ON f.id = sf.id
WHERE COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY copies DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH swift_files AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f.id
  FROM files f
  JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
  WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
    AND lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
), copies AS (
  SELECT id, CAST(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS seen_times,
            CAST(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appearing ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS appearing_times,
            CAST(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1) AS INTEGER) AS appears_times
  FROM contents
)
SELECT sf.id,
       COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) AS copies,
       f.repo_name,
       f.path
FROM swift_files sf
JOIN copies c ON c.id = sf.id
JOIN files f ON f.id = sf.id
WHERE COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY copies DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH swift_ids AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f.id
  FROM files f
  JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
  WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
    AND lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
), copies AS (
  SELECT id,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS seen_times,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appearing ([0-9]+) times', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS appearing_times,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS appears_times
  FROM contents
)
SELECT si.id,
       COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) AS copies,
       f.repo_name,
       f.path
FROM swift_ids si
JOIN copies c ON c.id = si.id
JOIN files f ON f.id = si.id
WHERE COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY copies DESC, si.id
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH swift_ids AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f.id
  FROM files f
  JOIN contents c ON c.id = f.id
  WHERE f.path LIKE '%.swift'
    AND lower(c.repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%'
), copies AS (
  SELECT id,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'seen ([0-9]+) times', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS seen_times,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appearing ([0-9]+) times', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS appearing_times,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(lower(repo_data_description), 'appears ([0-9]+) times', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS appears_times
  FROM contents
)
SELECT si.id,
       COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) AS copies,
       f.repo_name,
       f.path
FROM swift_ids si
JOIN copies c ON c.id = si.id
JOIN files f ON f.id = si.id
WHERE COALESCE(c.seen_times, c.appearing_times, c.appears_times) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY copies DESC, si.id
LIMIT 1;
